task: Refocus TODO and relevant docs on one B2B trajectory dataset/eval pipeline instead of mixing it with the legacy trace-note-skill loop.
summary: Removed the legacy note/skill promotion loop as a product model from visible docs and instruction surfaces, and made the canonical repo product pipeline agent run -> structured event -> verified trajectory row -> curated dataset/eval corpus.
observations: TODO.md now states the repo should converge on one debugging_trajectory.v1 product pipeline and treats skills/notes as legacy/internal during migration.
Product and onboarding docs point to docs/trajectory-dataset-schema.md as the canonical dataset row contract.
Agent instruction surfaces tell agents not to preserve legacy note/skill promotion as a second product loop and to route new product behavior through structured events and trajectory rows.
Search found no remaining old loop phrases such as trace -> note -> skill, supporting local loop, or better future action in the checked docs and instruction surfaces.
